headline: KKR Balances Credit Fund Redemptions With PolyPeptide Deal Ambitions
summary: KKR is facing a wave of investor redemption requests in its private credit funds, prompting withdrawal limits similar to those seen at other large asset managers. The redemption pressure highlights client concerns around liquidity in private markets and the structure of semi-liquid credit vehicles. At the same time, KKR is reported to be exploring an acquisition of PolyPeptide Group, a move that would extend its reach in pharmaceutical and biotech services. For investors watching NYSE:KKR,...

headline: Is It Too Early To Reconsider KKR (KKR) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: Wondering whether KKR at around US$91.22 is offering value or asking you to pay up? This article walks through what the current share price might be telling you. The stock is broadly flat over the last 7 days and up 4.7% over the past month, but shows a 29.2% decline year to date and a 9.5% decline over the last year, all against much stronger 3 year and 5 year returns of 79.7% and 78.6% respectively. Recent headlines have focused on KKR's role as a major player in alternative assets and...
